meta.note: Smoke bench baseline (10K rows × 128d × IVF_FLAT-32). Values are conservative lower bounds for QPS and upper bounds for P99ms, set slightly below the 2026-04-18 measured values so normal CI variance (±5-10%) doesn't produce false regressions. Tighten over time as variance is characterized. See docs/HARDENING_PLAN.md §H22 and benchmarks/check_regression.py.

configs.comment: Single-shard happy path; the simplest configuration. If this fails the whole cluster is sick.
Concurrent multi-shard — the common case for real workloads.
